title: AV:Link | 3 Port USB Mini Hub USB Type-C Plug to 3 x USB-A ports | Add up to 3 More USB devices to your laptop, PC, or Smart Device | Lightning Fast Data Transfers
features: Enhanced Connectivity | Instantly expand your laptop or PC's connectivity options with three additional USB ports
Blazing Fast Transfer Speeds | Enjoy rapid data transfers with USB 3.2 technology, providing speeds of up to 5Gbps
Effortless Setup | Experience hassle-free installation with simple Plug & Play functionality. No additional drivers or software are required
Compact and Lightweight | This mini USB hub features a compact and lightweight design, making it perfect for travel and working on the go
Versatile Compatibility | Compatible with a wide range of devices, including laptops, PCs, and more, this USB hub ensures seamless integration
description: From the manufacturer AV:Link | 3 Port USB Mini Hub USB Type-C Plug to 3 x USB-A Ports | Add More USB devices to your laptop, PC, or Smart Device The ultimate solution for expanding connectivity and enhancing productivity on the go. Seamlessly integrate up to three additional devices with your laptop or PC using this sleek and efficient USB hub. Crafted with simplicity and versatility in mind, this mini USB hub instantly transforms your laptop's USB Type-C port into a powerhouse, featuring a USB-A 3.2 port for super-speed transfers and two additional USB-A 2.0 ports for enhanced connectivity. Experience lightning-fast data transfers with transfer speeds of up to 5Gbps for USB-A 3.2 devices and 480Mbps for USB-A 2.0 devices, ensuring swift and efficient data exchange without compromising performance. Setting up your new USB hub is a breeze with its simple Plug & Play installation, eliminating the need for additional drivers or software. Just plug it in, and you're ready to go, enhancing your workflow with minimal effort. Designed for the modern professional, this hub boasts a compact and lightweight design, making it the perfect companion for professionals on the move. Slip it into your bag or pocket effortlessly and enjoy enhanced connectivity wherever your work takes you. PRODUCT FEATURES & SPECIFICATION: Instantly provides three additional USB-A ports to compatible devices Supports transfer speeds up to 5Gbps (USB3.2) and 480Mbps (USB2.0) Simple Plug & Play installation Compact, lightweight design makes it ideal for travel Connector USB 3.2 Type-C Interface 1* USB3.2 and 2* USB2.0 Type-A Ports Data transfer rate 1* USB3.2 = 5Gbps, 2* USB2.0 = 480Mbps Dimensions 55 x 24 x 20mm Weight 16g
